---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for RosalindDB
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Description
A clear and concise description of the feature.

## Motivation
What problem does this solve? When does it bite you?

## Proposed solution
What you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives considered
Other approaches you thought about and why they fell short.

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Feature does X
- [ ] Feature handles Y edge case
- [ ] Tests cover the new behavior
- [ ] Docs updated

## Implementation notes (optional)
If you have ideas about how this could be implemented.

## Impact
- **Performance**: None / Low / Medium / High
- **Breaking changes**: Yes / No — describe if yes
- **New dependencies**: list if any

## Contributing
- [ ] I've searched for similar requests
- [ ] This is not a duplicate
- [ ] I'd be willing to help implement
